name: Crepes- to Make and Store
recipeInstructions:
1. In a blender or food processor, combine the water, milk, eggs, salt, and flour. Blend until smooth.
2. If the batter is too thick, add more water; if it's too thin, gradually whisk in more flour.
3. Cover and refrigerate the batter for at least 1 hour.
4. Heat a 7-inch crepe pan or non-stick pan coated with oil or melted butter over high heat until hot.
5. Pour about 3 tablespoons of batter into the center of the pan. Cook undisturbed for about 1 minute, or until set.
6. Using a thin spatula, quickly lift the edge of the crepe and gently flip it to cook the other side for 30 seconds.
7. Slide the cooked crepe onto a plate. Repeat with remaining batter.
8. To store, layer cooked crepes with waxed paper or parchment squares in between each one. Freeze in batches.
Yield: about 12 crepes
